body: references/agent-improvements.md lists 5 priority improvement ideas. Most have already been implemented or have dedicated tickets: concurrency protection (T-15, closed), notes (T-17, closed), machine output (T-27, closed), separation of concerns (T-10, closed), embedding (embedding.md). The file should either be updated to reflect current state or removed, since it creates confusion about what's still needed.
title: references/agent-improvements.md is stale
